productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Parma Reversible Blue Shirts
description: CompositionBlue shirt with white stripes, made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar with a full front button placket, full hand cuff sleeves, two buttoned flap pockets on either chest and branding on left hemFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryWear your brand in style with this striped shirt from wrangler – the brand that has been clothing the world since 1947.
